executives.name: Dale Corman
executives.background: Mr. Corman has over 50 years of experience in mineral exploration and development. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Western Silver Corporation.

executives.name: Kevin O'Kane
executives.background: Mr. O'Kane is a mining executive with over 35 years of experience, including senior roles at BHP Billiton and SSR Mining.

executives.name: Michelle Tanguay
executives.background: Ms. Tanguay has over 25 years of experience in environmental management and regulatory affairs in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Sustainability and Community Relations

executives.name: Nicholas Van Dyk
executives.background: Mr. Van Dyk is a public company executive with over 20 years of experience in corporate development, finance, and investor relations in the mining sector.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Corporate Development and Investor Relations
